title: SBK Tree Stump Killer, Treats Up to 8 Stumps, Kills Roots, Easy To Use - 250ML
features: PREVENTS REGROWTH: Part of the popular SBK range, SBK Tree Stump Killer kills tree stumps and their roots to prevent regrowth. It can also be used on woody weeds and hardwood saplings.

GLYPHOSATE FREE: A glyphosate-free option, SBK Tree Stump Killer is a soluble concentrate which should be used for the treatment of tree stumps during autumn and winter, avoiding April, May and June when the sap is rising.
SUITABLE FOR UP TO 8 TREE STUMPS: One 250ml concentrate can treat up to eight stumps, kills at the root to prevent re-growth

IDEAL FOR GRASSLAND / WOODLAND: SBK Tree Stump Killer is intended to be used in grassland and non-crop areas. Avoid planted areas and if using for woody weeds, apply from June to August when the soil is moist and weeds are actively growing.
EASY TO USE: The diluted concentrate can be painted, sprayed or applied with a watering can. Both children and pets can be allowed onto the treated area once dried.
description: Product Description Kills tree roots to prevent regrowth Directions [General description of possible directions based on the product type and brand] Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Use protective clothing, gloves, and eye/face protection. Do not apply on planted areas. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat sources and direct sunlight. Dispose of the container and any remaining product in accordance with local regulations. See more
